## 🏷️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature / lab (non-breaking, adds functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update (README, guides, comments)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚙️ Infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
- [ ] 🌐 New stage content (SQL, shell scripts, YAML)

## 🧪 Testing Done
- [ ] Tested locally on Docker (`docker compose up`)
- [ ] SQL scripts executed against PostgreSQL 16
- [ ] Shell scripts run without errors
- [ ] YAML validated with `yamllint`
- [ ] Shell scripts checked with `shellcheck`
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or sensitive data
- [ ] New files include header comments (SQL/Shell) or Overview section (Markdown)
- [ ] Bilingual (EN/VN) for documentation files
- [ ] `README.md` updated if adding new files or sections
- [ ] CI pipeline passes (GitHub Actions)
